title: LLB Jobs 2026 – Special Judicial Magistrate
shortInfo: Sonbhadra District Court Recruitment 2026 for post of Special Judicial Magistrate. Candidates Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 05-07-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through Sonbhadra District Court official website.

basic_details.job_title: Sonbhadra District Court Special Judicial Magistrate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Sonbhadra District Court Recruitment 2026 for post of Special Judicial Magistrate. Candidates Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 05-07-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through Sonbhadra District Court official website.

application_fee.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.details: Please refer to the official notification for eligibility criteria details.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://districts.ecourts.gov.in/sonbhadra.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 05-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the Sonbhadra District Court Special Judicial Magistrate posts?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the Special Judicial Magistrate posts in Sonbhadra District Court is 05 July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: How can I apply for the Special Judicial Magistrate position?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline. You need to download the application form from the official website, fill it out, and send it along with required documents via post to the address specified in the notification.

faq.question: What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the "Important Links" section of this article. It contains all the detailed information about the recruitment.

faq.question: What is the total number of vacancies for the Special Judicial Magistrate post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Special Judicial Magistrate in the Sonbhadra District Court recruitment.

faq.question: What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Special Judicial Magistrate position is contractual, as indicated in the recruitment details.

faq.question: What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 6984/2026/SJM/Admin “G-1”/Allahabad.

faq.question: What is the official website for Sonbhadra District Court?
faq.answer: The official website for Sonbhadra District Court is https://districts.ecourts.gov.in/sonbhadra. You can visit this site for more information.

faq.question: Are there any specific age limits mentioned for the Special Judicial Magistrate post?
faq.answer: Specific age limits are not detailed here. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for precise age criteria and any applicable relaxations.

faq.question: What are the important dates for this recruitment process?
faq.answer: The notification date was 25 May 2026, and the last date to receive applications is 05 July 2026. Mark these dates to ensure timely application.
